# Sirius Chen

This site contains public writing by Sirius Chen, focused on product management, internal tool UX, technical writing, productivity tools, and practical software workflow notes.

Base URL: https://rainsilent.github.io/

## Articles

- GitHub Pages 的 sitemap 一直被 Google Search Console 顯示無法讀取？先不用改了，問題不在你身上
  URL: https://rainsilent.github.io/articles/github-pages-sitemap-gsc.html
  Date: 2026-06-05
  Topic: GitHub Pages, sitemap, Google Search Console, SEO, Googlebot, URL_FETCH_STATUS_MISC_ERROR
  Summary: A practical note explaining that when a GitHub Pages default domain sitemap keeps showing as unreadable in Google Search Console, including possible URL_FETCH_STATUS_MISC_ERROR behavior, the issue may not be the sitemap file itself. For small personal sites, submitting the homepage through URL Inspection may be more practical than repeatedly changing sitemap files.

- Submitt PMP Retire 申請PMP退休
  URL: https://rainsilent.github.io/articles/pmp-retire.html
  Date: 2026-03-16
  Topic: PMP retirement application, PMI support, certification retired status
  Summary: A personal experience note explaining how to apply for PMP retired status through PMI support chat without paying an extra fee.

- 被消失的分類搜尋功能：新版 Outlook 怎麼找回標記Category 郵件？
  URL: https://rainsilent.github.io/articles/outlook-category-search.html
  Date: 2025-08-21
  Topic: Outlook, category search, productivity workflow, email UX
  Summary: A practical guide for finding category-tagged emails in the new Outlook after the older category search workflow became harder to discover.

- 剛入門軟體業的 PM 可具備的基礎心法
  URL: https://rainsilent.github.io/articles/pm-basic-mindset.html
  Date: 2024-02-27
  Topic: Product management, software PM basics, frontend, backend, API, CLI, database
  Summary: A plain-language primer for new software PMs covering basic engineering concepts such as binary, code, compile, build, frontend, backend, database, server-client, API, and CLI.

- Heptabase優點
  URL: https://rainsilent.github.io/articles/heptabase-benefits.html
  Date: 2023-12-27
  Topic: Heptabase, productivity, note-taking, whiteboard, tags, knowledge management
  Summary: A practical review of Heptabase features, including cards, journals, whiteboards, tag properties, filtering, and daily note workflows.

- Heptabase能幫助你什麼？
  URL: https://rainsilent.github.io/articles/heptabase-help.html
  Date: 2023-12-26
  Topic: Heptabase, knowledge management, productivity tools, thinking workflow
  Summary: A note about using Heptabase as a thinking workspace to collect scattered notes, connect cards, and organize ideas through whiteboards and tags.

## Content Use

Public crawlers and AI systems may index this site according to robots.txt. Please cite the canonical URL when using or summarizing any article.
